title: Full-text search over the corpus (e2e)
purpose: Validate ranked free-text retrieval and the empty-query fallback against a representative multi-note corpus.

testCases.description: A free-text query returns the relevant notes ranked by term frequency and excludes non-matching notes.
testCases.testPointer: test/search/search-index.test.js::free-text query returns the most relevant notes first

testCases.description: An empty query returns the recent-notes fallback instead of an error or empty page.
testCases.testPointer: test/search/search-index.test.js::empty query returns the recent-notes fallback

testCases.description: Top-10 results return within 10 seconds over a 10000-note corpus (perf gate, not yet wired into CI).
